response_level_residuals_explain: bubble/direct/total are normal-state response-level residuals from physical_ward_residuals; ward_contraction_decomposition stores iomega, qx, qy terms before summing
operator_level_residuals_explain: Peierls vertex identity is checked before response assembly and is distinct from response-level residuals

bubble_equal_time_term.definition: Denominator-cancelled left bubble Ward term using the same finite-q band basis, source vertices, k weights, and Fermi occupations as the normal bubble.

interband_contribution.band_partition: m != n in the finite-q sorted band labels

intraband_contribution.band_partition: m == n in the finite-q sorted band labels

direct_contact_contraction.definition: qx * D[x,nu] + qy * D[y,nu] from the normal direct/contact response.
